assertions.title: Expanded Stock Universe Fully Backfilled

assertions.issues: Backfill has not been completed for the expanded stock universe. 1612 pre-2021 watchlist stocks have no kline data before 2021-06-01. Only 423 of 1938 watchlist stocks have any daily kline data at all. Most stocks have only 50-199 rows (NOT full 5-year backfill per key data state).

assertions.title: Cleanup Does Not Delete Backfilled Data

steps.observed: Default parameter days=1825 at line 109; cutoff = datetime.now() - timedelta(days=1825)
Cutoff: 2021-03-27. Oldest data: 2021-01-04. 110 records (0.2%) from Jan-Mar 2021 fall outside rolling window. 99.8% of data preserved.
65,548 total; only 110 would be deleted (within expected rolling window behavior)

summary: Tested 4 assertions: 3 passed, 1 failed. VAL-CROSS-002 FAILED: only 423 of 1938 watchlist stocks have daily kline data, and only 2 stocks have data before 2021-06-01 — backfill for the expanded universe has not been completed. VAL-CROSS-003 PASSED: cleanup correctly uses 1825-day retention. VAL-CROSS-005 PASSED: scheduler processes stocks and all 8 indices without errors. VAL-CROSS-006 PASSED: quant-dashboard MarketReader reads 5-year data for stocks, all CSI indices, and expanded trade calendar.
